a:Tca14,<div class="specification">
<p>The mean systolic blood pressure and body mass index (BMI) of many individuals were measured. The results are displayed in the box plot.</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: center;">[Reprinted from <em>Obesity Research &amp; Clinical Practice</em>, <strong>9</strong>(2), Noritaka Kawada, Kaori Nakanishi, Tohru Ohama, Makoto Nishida, Keiko Yamauchi-Takihara and Toshiki Moriyama, 'Gender differences in the relationship between blood pressure and body mass index during adolescence', pp. 141–151, Copyright (2015), with permission from Elsevier. https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/obesity-research-and-clinical-practice]</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">Compare and contrast the relationship between BMI and systolic blood pressure in males and females.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">Outline the relationship between systolic blood pressure and hypertension.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">State <strong>two</strong> effects hypertension can have on the circulatory system.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">State how blood pressure and heart rate can be measured.</p>
<p style="text-align: left;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>b:T68f,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. both males and females have higher «mean/range» SBP as weight increases<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>both males and females have highest SBP for overweight BMI ✔</p>
<p>b. «SPB» males «slightly» greater than females in all BMIs ✔</p>
<p>c. similar values/no/little difference between underweight and normal weight in females but «visible/obvious» difference in males ✔</p>
<p>d. range of SBP narrower in «overweight» females than males ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>«at rest/chronic/constant» higher than normal «120 mmHg» systolic blood pressure is an indicator of hypertension ✔<br/><em>OWTTE</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>stroke ✔</p>
<p>thrombosis ✔</p>
<p>blood clot ✔</p>
<p>heart attack ✔</p>
<p>heart failure ✔</p>
<p>aortic aneurysms ✔</p>
<p>coronary heart disease/CHD ✔</p>
<p>peripheral arterial disease ✔</p>
<p>atherosclerosis ✔</p>
<p> </p>
<p>Award up to <strong><em>[2 max]</em></strong> for the first two answers given</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p><em>blood pressure</em>:</p>
<p>sphygmomanometer/blood pressure monitor<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>description how this is used ✔</p>
<p> </p>
<p><em>heart rate</em>:</p>
<p>taking pulse manually/using a blood rate monitor/stethoscope «to count the beats» ✔<br/><em>OWTTE</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/d/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","d"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"18N.3.HL.TZ0.19"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"18N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","d-4-the-heart"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.i.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.ii.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
